name: Tuna Club
recipeIngredient: 6 slices low-fat bacon, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the bread as desired.
2. Lay 2 slices of bread on a work surface.
3. Spread mayonnaise evenly over the toast.
4. Divide the tuna salad mixture between the 2 slices and spread evenly.
5. Arrange 3 strips of bacon on top of each slice.
6. Spread a little more mayonnaise on 2 additional slices of toast.
7. Place one slice, mayonnaise-side down, on each serving of bacon.
8. Spread a little more mayonnaise on the remaining side and divide lettuce over the tops.
9. Spread more mayonnaise on the other 2 slices of bread.
10. Invert one toast onto either sandwich.
11. Invert 4 toothpicks into each sandwich.
12. Cut into quarters.
